name: Auto-suggest fixes — verify Copy Fix button with a complex PR
description: Use a complex PR that is likely to produce fix suggestions. Verify the full suggestion card UI: issue title in red, side-by-side code blocks, Copy Fix button that changes to Copied ✓, and explanation text.

planSteps.description: Paste 'https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/500' into the PR URL input and click 'Analyze PR'
Wait for the full review report to load (spinner disappears and review cards appear)
The review report is visible with a quality score and verdict badge
A section titled '🔧 Auto-suggested Fixes' is visible below the review cards

The section shows either: (a) one or more suggestion cards with a red issue title and two code block panels labeled '❌ Current Code' and '✅ Fixed Code', or (b) the message '✅ No fixes needed — code looks clean!' — both are valid outcomes
If suggestion cards are present, click the 'Copy Fix' button on the first suggestion card
If 'Copy Fix' was clicked, the button text changes to 'Copied ✓' within 2 seconds
If suggestion cards are present, an explanation text starting with '💡' is visible below the code blocks
